mapper.select:
SELECT E.EQ_ID AS eqId, E.EQ_NAME AS eqName, E.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, E.EQ_SDATE AS eqSdate, E.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid,
W.WP_NAME AS wpName,
S.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName,
300 AS totalTime, 290 AS runTime, '91.2%' AS runRate
FROM EQUIPMENT E LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID
AND E.EQ_WPID = #{eqWpid}
AND E.EQ_STATUS = #{eqStatus}
AND ( UPPER(E.EQ_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(E.EQ_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY E.EQ_ID DESC

SELECT E.EQ_ID AS eqId, E.EQ_NAME AS eqName, E.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, E.EQ_SDATE AS eqSdate, E.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid, E.EQ_VENDOR AS eqVendor, E.EQ_MANAGER AS eqManager,
S.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName,
W.WP_NAME AS wpName,
V.VENDOR_NAME AS eqVendorName,
EMP.EMP_NAME AS eqManagerName,
300 AS totalTime, 290 AS runTime, '91.23%' AS runRate
FROM EQUIPMENT E LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID LEFT JOIN VENDOR V ON E.EQ_VENDOR = V.VENDOR_ID LEFT JOIN EMP EMP ON E.EQ_MANAGER = EMP.EMP_ID
WHERE E.EQ_ID = #{eqId}

SELECT ELOG_ID AS elogId, ELOG_EQID AS elogEqid, ELOG_SDATE AS elogSdate, ELOG_EDATE AS elogEdate, ELOG_REASON AS elogReason, ELOG_CONTENT AS elogContent, ELOG_RESULT AS elogResult, ELOG_WORKER AS elogWorker, ELOG_USAGE AS elogUsage FROM EQ_LOG WHERE ELOG_EQID = #{eqId} AND ELOG_USAGE = 'Y' ORDER BY ELOG_SDATE DESC

SELECT EQ_RUN_NO AS eqRunNo, EQ_RUN_EQID AS eqRunEqid, EQ_RUN_STIME AS eqRunStime, EQ_RUN_ETIME AS eqRunEtime, EQ_STOP_REASON AS eqStopReason FROM EQ_RUN_LOG WHERE EQ_RUN_EQID = #{eqId} ORDER BY EQ_RUN_STIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQUIPMENT ( EQ_ID, EQ_NAME, EQ_STATUS, EQ_SDATE, EQ_WPID, EQ_VENDOR, EQ_MANAGER ) VALUES ( 'EQ' || EQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{eqName}, 20, SYSDATE, #{eqWpid}, #{eqVendor}, #{eqManager} )
mapper.select: SELECT WP_ID AS wpId, WP_NAME AS wpName FROM WORKPLACE ORDER BY WP_ID ASC
